top_story.title: S&P 500 rallies to new record, Spirit Airlines at risk of bankruptcy
top_story.summary: Yahoo Finance Anchor Josh LIpton tracks today's top moving stocks and biggest market stories in this Market Minute, including US stocks (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) extending their rally on Thursday, Bloomberg reporting that Spirit Aviation (FLYYQ) could file for bankruptcy, and Voyager Technologies (VOYG) landing a private space mission contract with NASA. Stay up to date on the latest market action, minute-by-minute, with Yahoo Finance's Market Minute.
